Minors' Compromise In Scd. (2)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Maureen McGowan, Esq. for Petitioner: Sabrina McCall, as Guardian at litem for: Monisha McCall and Staarkeisha Jammer aka Starkeisha McCall, minor Claimants.
Order waiving appearance of Petitioner is in file.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved as follows:
Attorney's Fees $1,186.42
A net balance of $3,551.08 for each minor, to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, 300 Hamilton Ave., Palo Alto, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
